title: Generate an image of Mr. Robot
acceptance_criteria: An original image is generated and saved to `assets/images/mr-robot.png`
Image is a clear portrait-style composition (subject centered, face visible)
Style matches Mr. Robot vibe (moody, gritty, glitchy hacker aesthetic)
No visible watermarks or embedded text

image_spec.subject: Mr. Robot (fictional character)
image_spec.prompt: Portrait of Mr. Robot (fictional hacker in a dark hoodie), moody cinematic lighting, gritty realistic look, subtle glitch artifacts, shallow depth of field, urban night background, high detail, no text, no watermark
image_spec.negative_prompt: logo, watermark, text, caption, distorted face, extra limbs

execution_notes: Use the Image Specialist (GPT-5 Image via OpenRouter) to generate the image from `image_spec.prompt`.
completion_summary: Generated original 1024x1024 PNG portrait at assets/images/mr-robot.png (no text/watermarks), with moody glitch hacker aesthetic and anonymous visible face.
